vwapNotes: SPY 740.66 vs VWAP 737.98 → +2.68 above. Risk-on. QQQ 723.27 vs VWAP 717.62 → +5.65 above. Tech leadership strong. IWM 298.16 vs VWAP 297.33 → +0.83 above (slight). Small-cap recovering from negative but lagging. VIX 17.71 — normal volatilite. Gap fill: SPY gap up from 728.99 açık ve genişleyen; QQQ gap up 706.52 açık; IWM gap down 299.83 henüz kapanmadı.

riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX 17.71 — normal volatilite (15-20 aralığı). 20+ geçerse elevated. Geopolitical premium hafif.
